title: primula lacerata
intro: Primula lacerata, also known as fragile primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the primrose family (Primulaceae). The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Primula lacerata are believed to have various health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and the alleviation of skin irritations and wounds. Primula lacerata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, making it a versatile remedy in traditional folk medicine.
